sentences.arabic: تَعْتَبِرُ الْخُصُوصِيَّةُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ أَمْرًا مُهِمًّا جِدًّا لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Digitalna privatnost se smatra veoma važnom stvarju za sve.
sentences.translationEn: Digital privacy is considered a very important matter for everyone.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَلَّا نُشَارِكَ كَلِمَاتِ الْمُرُورِ مَعَ أَيِّ شَخْصٍ غَرِيبٍ.
sentences.translation: Ne smijemo dijeliti lozinke ni sa jednom nepoznatom osobom.
sentences.translationEn: We must not share passwords with any stranger.

sentences.arabic: حِمَايَةُ الْبَيَانَاتِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ تَحْمِي الْمُسْتَخْدِمَ مِنَ الْمَخَاطِرِ.
sentences.translation: Zaštita ličnih podataka štiti korisnika od opasnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Protecting personal data protects the user from risks.
